name: grayscale-toggle
description: Toggle grayscale effect for monitors with keyboard shortcuts and panel indicator

scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && npm run copy-files && npm run compile-schemas
scripts.build:prod: npm run clean && npm run compile && npm run copy-files && npm run compile-schemas && npm run package
scripts.compile-schemas: mkdir -p dist/schemas && cp schemas/*.gschema.xml dist/schemas/ && (glib-compile-schemas dist/schemas 2>/dev/null || echo 'Schema compilation will occur during installation')
scripts.install:extension: npm run build:prod && gnome-extensions install dist/grayscale-toggle@luiz.dev.zip
scripts.dev: npm run build:dev && npm run install:extension
scripts.validate: npm run compile && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.test:build: npm run build:prod && echo 'Build test passed'

author: Luiz
